description_long: This rifle features a distinctive wooden thumbhole stock with large cutouts, providing ergonomic support and a lightweight structure. The main body and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and tactical appearance. A prominent scope is mounted on top, indicating the rifle is designed for precision shooting at distance. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is long and straight, with a squared-off muzzle that may accommodate a suppressor or other muzzle device. The overall design suggests a modern sniper or designated marksman rifle, suitable for urban environments where accuracy and stability are prioritized.
description: A modern rifle with a wooden thumbhole stock, metal body, mounted scope, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and scope, with the thumbhole stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden thumbhole stock, mounted scope, detachable box magazine, and long barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the thumbhole stock and scope clearly visible.
